# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:

        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)}), pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
